v1DeleteMode.description:
Selects deletion of the knowledge source. Carries no fields; its presence in
the mode oneof is the instruction to delete.

v1FileContent.description:
A file to be processed into knowledge. The bytes are not sent inline;
instead supply the upload_handle obtained from the file-upload flow.

fileName.description:
The original file name to display for the source (for example,
"handbook.pdf").

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the uploaded file (for example, "application/pdf").

uploadHandle.description:
A signed, single-use handle identifying the uploaded file to ingest, as
issued by the knowledge file-upload flow. Required when supplying new file
content.

v1GetKnowledgeStatusRequest.description: Request to look up the processing status of a single knowledge source.

accountGroupId.description:
The account group that owns the knowledge source (format:
"AG-XXXXXXXXXX"). The calling partner must own this account.

knowledgeSourceId.description:
The id of the knowledge source to look up, as returned by UpsertKnowledge
or ListKnowledge. The source must exist in the namespace.

partnerId.description:
The partner namespace that owns the knowledge source. Must be the
calling partner's own partner id.

v1GetKnowledgeStatusResponse.description: The processing status of the requested knowledge source.

v1KnowledgeConfigType.description:
The kind of content backing a knowledge source.

 - KNOWLEDGE_CONFIG_TYPE_BUSINESS_PROFILE: Structured business profile data managed by the platform, such as the
well-known business-profile knowledge source created for an account.
 - KNOWLEDGE_CONFIG_TYPE_CUSTOM_DATA: Free-form text content supplied directly by a user or integration.
 - KNOWLEDGE_CONFIG_TYPE_WEBSITE: Content scraped from a website.
 - KNOWLEDGE_CONFIG_TYPE_FILE: Content extracted from an uploaded file.

v1KnowledgeContent.description:
The content to store for a knowledge source when creating or updating it.
Exactly one variant must be set, and it determines the source's config_type.
On update, the variant must match the existing source's config_type; the
config_type of a source cannot be changed after creation.

v1KnowledgeSourceSummary.description:
A summary of a single knowledge source within an account's knowledge base:
identity, content type, processing status, and timestamps.

created.description: When the knowledge source was created.

fileName.description:
The original file name of the uploaded file. Only set when config_type is
KNOWLEDGE_CONFIG_TYPE_FILE.

knowledgeSourceId.description:
The unique identifier of the knowledge source within its namespace.
Store this id to update or remove the source later; it is the selector
used by the other Knowledge APIs.

name.description: The display name of the knowledge source.

updated.description: When the knowledge source was last updated.

v1ListKnowledgeRequest.description:
Request to list the knowledge sources in a namespace's knowledge base,
optionally filtered to one AI Employee.

accountGroupId.description:
The account group whose knowledge to list (format: "AG-XXXXXXXXXX").
The calling partner must own this account.

assistantId.description:
Optional. When set, only knowledge sources attached to this AI Employee
are returned. Supply the AI Employee's assistant id (format:
"ASSISTANT-XXXX"; a bare id without the "ASSISTANT-" prefix is also
accepted). Internal application ids are not part of this contract and are
not accepted. An unknown assistant id returns an empty list.

partnerId.description:
The partner namespace whose knowledge to list. Must be the calling
partner's own partner id.

v1ListKnowledgeResponse.description: A page of knowledge sources with pagination metadata.

knowledgeSources.description: The knowledge sources on this page.

v1RemoveKnowledgeRequest.description:
Request to remove a knowledge source from a namespace's knowledge base,
either by deleting it or by unlinking it from specific AI Employees.

accountGroupId.description:
The account group that owns the knowledge source (format:
"AG-XXXXXXXXXX"). The calling partner must own this account.

knowledgeSourceId.description:
The id of the knowledge source to remove, as returned by UpsertKnowledge
or ListKnowledge. The source must exist in the namespace.

partnerId.description:
The partner namespace that owns the knowledge source. Must be the
calling partner's own partner id.

v1RemoveKnowledgeResponse.description: The result of a RemoveKnowledge call.

v1TextContent.description: Free-form text content supplied directly by an integration.

text.description: The text to store as knowledge.

v1TrainingErrorCode.description:
Machine-readable reason a knowledge source failed processing.

 - TRAINING_ERROR_CODE_INVALID: No error recorded. This is the value when the source has not failed
processing (state is not TRAINING_STATE_ERRORED).
 - TRAINING_ERROR_CODE_LARGE_FILE_CONTENT: The file content exceeds the maximum size that can be processed.
 - TRAINING_ERROR_CODE_UNPROCESSABLE_CONTENT: The content could not be parsed or processed.

v1TrainingState.description:
The processing state of a knowledge source's content.

 - TRAINING_STATE_QUEUED: Queued for processing; the content is not yet available to AI Employees.
 - TRAINING_STATE_IN_PROGRESS: Processing is underway.
 - TRAINING_STATE_DONE: Processing completed successfully; the content is available to AI Employees.
 - TRAINING_STATE_ERRORED: Processing failed; see the error_code on TrainingStatus for the reason.

v1TrainingStatus.description:
The processing status of a knowledge source, including progress counters
and any terminal error.

completedUnits.description:
The number of units processed successfully so far. Equal to total_units
when processing is complete.

totalUnits.description:
The total number of units the source's content was divided into for
processing. 0 when the source has not been processed in units.

v1UnlinkMode.description:
Selects unlinking the knowledge source from specific AI Employees without
deleting it.

assistantIds.description:
The AI Employees to unlink the source from. Supply each AI Employee's
assistant id exactly as issued by the AI Assistant APIs (format:
"ASSISTANT-XXXX"; a bare id without the "ASSISTANT-" prefix is also
accepted). Internal application ids are not part of this contract and are
rejected. At least one id is required.

v1UpsertKnowledgeRequest.description:
Request to create or update a knowledge source and optionally link it to an
AI Employee.

accountGroupId.description:
The account group whose knowledge base the source belongs to (format:
"AG-XXXXXXXXXX"). The calling partner must own this account.

assistantId.description:
Optional. When set, the knowledge source is linked to this AI Employee so
its content is available to the employee. Supply the AI Employee's assistant id exactly
as issued by the AI Assistant APIs (format: "ASSISTANT-XXXX"; a bare id
without the "ASSISTANT-" prefix is also accepted). Linking is additive and
idempotent; omit to leave the source's existing assistant links untouched.

description.title:
The description of the knowledge source.  On update,
omit to leave the existing content unchanged

knowledgeSourceId.description:
Optional. The id of the knowledge source to update. Omit to create a new
source; the server generates and returns its id. When set, the source
must already exist in the namespace.

name.description:
The display name of the knowledge source. Required on create. On update,
leave empty to keep the current name.

partnerId.description:
The partner namespace whose knowledge base the source belongs to. Must
be the calling partner's own partner id.

v1UpsertKnowledgeResponse.description: The result of an UpsertKnowledge call.

knowledgeSourceId.description:
The id of the created or updated knowledge source. Store this id to update
or link the source in later calls; it is the selector used by the other
Knowledge APIs.

cursor.description: Optional. An opaque token from a previous response's next_cursor to retrieve the next page of results. Omit or leave empty for the first page.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of items to return per page.

hasMore.title: Whether or not more results exist

nextCursor.title: A cursor that can be provided to retrieve the next page of results

totalResults.title: The total number of results. This is not supported on all paged apis and will be 0 if it is not supported

scopes.knowledge: Allows the application to manage the knowledge available to AI Employees on your accounts
scopes.knowledge:read: Allows the application view-only access to the knowledge available to AI Employees on your accounts

info.description: Manage the knowledge available to AI Employees on your accounts.
info.title: AI Knowledge

post.description:
List the knowledge sources in an account's or partner's knowledge base, with pagination.

Required OAuth2 scopes: `knowledge` or `knowledge:read`

requestBody.description:
Request to list the knowledge sources in a namespace's knowledge base,
optionally filtered to one AI Employee.

post.description:
Delete a knowledge source, or unlink it from specific AI Employees, in an account's or partner's knowledge base.

Required OAuth2 scopes: `knowledge`

requestBody.description:
Request to remove a knowledge source from a namespace's knowledge base,
either by deleting it or by unlinking it from specific AI Employees.

post.description:
Get the processing status of a single knowledge source in an account's or partner's knowledge base.

Required OAuth2 scopes: `knowledge` or `knowledge:read`

requestBody.description: Request to look up the processing status of a single knowledge source.

post.description:
Create or update a knowledge source in an account's or partner's knowledge base, and optionally link it to an AI assistant.

Required OAuth2 scopes: `knowledge`

requestBody.description:
Request to create or update a knowledge source and optionally link it to an
AI Employee.
